enabler_story_labels.story-vibepro-merge-delta-review-reuse: Reduce redundant agent reviews for merge-only stale HEAD changes
enabler_story_labels.story-vibepro-pr-create-existing-refresh: 既存PRへの追加コミット後もPR作成artifactを最新headへ更新する
enabler_story_labels.story-vibepro-pr-prepare-timeout-progres: pr prepareが無出力で固まらず進捗とタイムアウトを返す
enabler_story_labels.story-vibepro-traceability-autobind-back: Story作成時のtraceability autobindとgap backfill分類で欠損を構造的に減らす

enabler_story_labels.story-docs-story-ssot-recovery: 要求とStoryの正本を復元する
enabler_story_labels.story-vibepro-agent-review-policy-config: VibePro should let repositories configure Agent Review policy by phase
enabler_story_labels.story-vibepro-usage-report-canonical-tra: usage reportのtraceability判定をcanonical artifact優先にする

handoff.purpose: Use this machine-derived context to create or revise a curated product Journey. Do not treat the candidate placements as authoritative.
instructions: Decide which product loop or user/business journey is being curated.
Classify candidate Story placements as core steps, supporting concerns, or out-of-journey evidence.
Resolve conflicts and blocking open questions explicitly.
Write a curated Journey JSON artifact before treating Journey status as available.

next_slice.focus: Keep the public manual aligned with the current repository-local control loop and verifiable release surface.

curation.notes: Curated for story-vibepro-manual-control-plane-refresh after confirming the generated journey has a covered walking skeleton, no conflicts, no open questions, and places this documentation/control-plane Story in the discover/supporting and hardening surfaces.
